# UI Skills

## Overview
A curated collection of UI design patterns, component recipes, and interface solutions. Use this skill when you need to recall proven interaction patterns, layout strategies, or component behaviors.

## Pattern Categories

### Navigation
- Top nav, sidebar, tab bar, breadcrumbs, pagination
- Responsive: hamburger menu, priority+, bottom nav

### Data Display
- Tables with sorting/filtering, data grids, cards, lists
- Charts (bar, line, donut) with accessible alternatives

### Input
- Forms with validation, search with autocomplete, file upload
- Date/time pickers, color pickers, rich text

### Feedback
- Toast/snackbar, modal/dialog, tooltip, popover
- Loading skeletons, progress bars, empty states

## When to Use
When asked about UI patterns, component behavior, or interface conventions. Cross-reference with the active design system for brand-specific styling.
